word_count_tool.name: word_count_tool
word_count_tool.description: Counts words in a text string.

url_fetch_tool.name: url_fetch_tool
url_fetch_tool.description: Fetches the text content of a specified URL using an HTTP GET request.

json_column_mean_tool.name: json_column_mean_tool
json_column_mean_tool.description: Calculates the arithmetic mean of a specified numerical column within a JSON array of objects.

json_column_median_tool.name: json_column_median_tool
json_column_median_tool.description: Calculates the median of a specified numerical column within a JSON array of objects.

json_column_describe_tool.name: json_column_describe_tool
json_column_describe_tool.description: Calculates summary statistics (count, mean, min, max, and sample standard deviation) for a specified numerical column in a JSON array of objects.

text_to_ascii_art_tool.name: text_to_ascii_art_tool
text_to_ascii_art_tool.description: Converts input text into stylized ASCII art using a fixed, simple font mapping.

word_reverser_tool.name: word_reverser_tool
word_reverser_tool.description: Reverses the order of words in an input string, preserving the spelling of individual words.

ai_research_dataset_example_tool.name: ai_research_dataset_example_tool
ai_research_dataset_example_tool.description: Provides a sample JSON array representing typical AI model performance results (e.g., accuracy, loss, F1-score) for testing data analysis tools.

morse_code_encoder_tool.name: morse_code_encoder_tool
morse_code_encoder_tool.description: Translates an input string (A-Z, 0-9, and spaces) into its corresponding standard International Morse code representation, using a slash (/) to separate words.

first_n_sentence_summary_tool.name: first_n_sentence_summary_tool
first_n_sentence_summary_tool.description: Extracts the first N sentences from an input text using simple sentence boundary detection.

url_slugifier_tool.name: url_slugifier_tool
url_slugifier_tool.description: Converts a text string into a URL-safe, lowercase, hyphenated slug, removing non-alphanumeric characters.

keyword_extractor_tool.name: keyword_extractor_tool
keyword_extractor_tool.description: Extracts relevant keywords from a block of text by normalizing and tokenizing the input.

python_syntax_detector_tool.name: python_syntax_detector_tool
python_syntax_detector_tool.description: Checks a given string of Python code for syntax errors and provides diagnostic feedback.

mood_to_music_tool.name: mood_to_music_tool
mood_to_music_tool.description: Recommends a music style, playlist theme, or song vibe based on a user-provided mood.

fake_error_generator_tool.name: fake_error_generator_tool
fake_error_generator_tool.description: Generates funny, fake computer error messages based on a user-provided theme or context.

social_media_post_generator_tool.name: social_media_post_generator_tool
social_media_post_generator_tool.description: Generates a complete social media post (headline, body text, and three relevant hashtags) optimized for short-form platforms based on a user-provided topic.

caveman_summarizer_tool.name: caveman_summarizer_tool
caveman_summarizer_tool.description: Summarizes input text into simple, funny, and easy-to-understand caveman-style language.
